name: agent-orch
description: MCP-driven multi-agent orchestration for delegating implementation to CC or AGY, targeted verification, and read-only monitoring of Agent Orch runs.

interface.shortDescription: MCP-driven multi-agent coding orchestration with CC, AGY, and Codex.
interface.longDescription: An MCP-driven workflow that keeps Codex in charge of project planning and final acceptance while CC or AGY implements, AGY performs targeted investigation or verification, and a read-only dashboard can inspect Agent Orch progress. Worker and reviewer operations are only available through MCP tools; the CLI handles project lifecycle, dashboard, and MCP configuration maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-orch to plan this change, delegate implementation via MCP tools, and verify it.
Use agent-orch to ask AGY to investigate this failure without duplicating implementation.
Use agent-orch to open a read-only dashboard for CC/AGY progress and visible conversation logs.
